note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the preparation of hydrogel inks for 3D printing and the development of a soft hybrid gripper using magnetic guidance and heating. The goal is to create a gripper capable of manipulating objects through magnetic forces.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A person in blue gloves prepares hydrogel inks by mixing them in a beaker.",
    "The mixture is heated on a hot plate.",
    "The heated ink is printed onto a surface using a 3D printer.",
    "The printed object is cooled and then heated again.",
    "The object is manipulated using magnetic guidance."
  ],

    "Hydrogel inks",
    "Hot plate",
    "3D printer",
    "Magnetic guidance system"
  ],

    "Hot plate",
    "3D printer",
    "Magnetic guidance system"
  ],

    "Time spent cooling and heating the printed object (not specified)"
  ],
  "key_transitions": [
    "From mixing hydrogel inks to heating them on a hot plate.",
    "From heating the ink to printing it onto a surface.",
    "From cooling the printed object to heating it again.",
    "From manipulating the object with magnetic guidance to heating it once more."
  ],
  "outcomes_or_indicators": [

    "Manipulation of the object using magnetic guidance"
